meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop manual coding. Learn to setup Claude Code and Antigravity to automate boilerplate, debug faster, and ship client projects 5x faster than before.
content.answer_block: To eliminate development bottlenecks, leverage Claude Code's CLI to automate file scaffolding and refactoring. By integrating Antigravity for high-context architectural planning, you reduce manual overhead. This setup allows you to offload repetitive implementation, enabling you to focus on high-value logic while maintaining production-grade code quality for your clients.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking on your sprint, your client is waiting for the demo, and you are still stuck in the abyss of boilerplate code and syntax debugging. Every hour spent on manual implementation is a margin-killer that prevents you from scaling your freelance business. You aren't just losing time; you're losing the ability to take on high-ticket projects.

But the paradigm has shifted. By mastering Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform from a manual coder into a systems architect. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about deploying an AI-driven workforce that executes your vision with surgical precision. It’s time to stop building line-by-line and start building at the speed of thought.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your project directory to be Claude-aware, ensuring the CLI has the necessary permissions to read your local codebase and documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project structure and generate a comprehensive .claude_ignore file to optimize token usage and focus the AI on relevant source files.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define high-level requirements before writing a single line of code, ensuring the AI understands your stack constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a technical specification for a scalable REST API using Fastify and TypeScript. Define the folder structure and core interface patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Implement the folder structure defined in the architect plan'

steps.title: Automated Scaffolding
steps.description: Leverage Claude's ability to generate production-ready boilerplate based on your specific project architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a CRUD controller pattern for the 'User' entity that follows clean architecture principles and includes error handling middleware.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Generate the User controller and service layer based on the current architecture'

steps.title: Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform deep-dives into existing bugs, providing the CLI with the relevant stack trace and surrounding file context.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Debug the race condition in the Auth middleware; analyze the connection pool logs and suggest a thread-safe fix.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Fix the race condition in auth.service.ts using the provided logs'

steps.title: Refactoring and Optimization
steps.description: Perform bulk refactoring to improve performance and code readability across the entire repository.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify code smells in the src/utils directory and refactor for better performance and type safety.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Apply the suggested refactorings to all files in /src/utils'

pro_tips: Always use a .claude_ignore file to prevent the AI from indexing massive node_modules or build artifacts, which saves tokens and increases response speed.
Chain your prompts: instead of one massive request, ask Claude Code to verify its own plan before writing the implementation.
Use the 'diff' mode in Claude Code to review changes line-by-line, ensuring you maintain control over complex architectural shifts.
Keep your documentation in the repo; Claude Code excels when it has access to local READMEs and technical specs to stay aligned with your style.
Alias your most frequent Claude commands in your shell profile (e.g., 'alias ca="claude ask"') to shave seconds off every interaction.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin by migrating one of your existing modules to Claude-driven maintenance to see the immediate impact on your workflow speed.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the editor and start owning your output. By implementing this high-velocity setup, you regain control over your time and project delivery. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
